title: Dashboard v2: themes, drawer, filters, richer cards & summary
description: Polish pass on corvee render. Replaces the basic kanban with a professional dashboard: single unified stylesheet handling auto/light/dark via prefers-color-scheme + in-page toggle (persisted to localStorage); per-item right-side drawer (URL hash deep-link, esc/backdrop close, modifier-click still opens standalone page in new tab); board filter bar (status/priority/kind/assignee chips + free-text search + show-abandoned toggle, URL-hash shareable); richer cards (kind chip, estimated-hours badge, capability count, dependency/block/AC counts, breadcrumb, due date with overdue styling, tags); per-item detail panels (full description, AC, dependencies/blocks/children as linked status-pilled rows, journal timeline, kv-table sidebar with every Item field including lease ID + lease expiry); redesigned summary (hero strip with completion/in-flight/open/blocked/throughput; critical-path stepper with status-colored bullets; segmented per-project progress bar; new per-epic rollup panel; friendly event labels + agent-colored avatars + timestamps in activity feed).
acceptance_criteria: Theme toggle button cycles auto → light → dark
Cards group by epic within each status column
Clicking any item opens a right-side drawer with full details (URL hash deep-links)
Drawer closes on Esc / backdrop click / close button
Middle/cmd-click on a card opens items/<id>.html in a new tab (fallback)
Board filter bar with status/priority/kind/assignee chips + text search + abandoned toggle
friendly activity with timestamps + agent avatars
make ci green; usecase coverage stays ≥90%; e2e snapshot stable across runs

journal.note: Shipped. See .tasks/dist/ — click any card on the board to open the drawer.
